title: GovernIQ Assessment Manifest
description: Complete schema for defining an assessment evaluation manifest. The manifest tells the GovernIQ engine what to check — it never executes logic itself. Every task maps to exactly one of six engine patterns: CREATE, CREATE_WITH_AMENDMENT, RETRIEVE, MODIFY, DELETE, EDGE_CASE.

assessment_name.description: Human-readable name shown in the UI (e.g. 'Medical Appointment Bot - Basic').

assessment_type.description: Domain category (e.g. 'medical', 'travel', 'hr'). Purely informational — the engine is domain-agnostic.

description.description: Optional description of what this assessment evaluates.

webhook_url.description: Bot's webhook URL. Usually provided by the candidate at submission time, not in the manifest.

mock_api_base_url.description: Candidate's Mock API endpoint. Usually provided at submission time.

conversation_starter.description: Fallback opening message if LLM is unavailable. LLM is primary for conversation start.

tasks.description: Ordered list of tasks the engine will execute. Each task maps to exactly one EnginePattern.

faq_config.description: FAQ evaluation configuration. FAQs are checked structurally (CBM) and optionally via webhook.

compliance_checks.description: Platform compliance checks (e.g. DialogGPT enabled, channels configured).

scoring_config.description: Weight configuration for scoring. Webhook is the authority — CBM is informational.

state_seeding_config.description: State seeding prevents cascade failures when CREATE tasks fail.

tooltips.description: Help text for evaluators, displayed alongside node types in the report.

assignment_brief.description: Candidate-facing: what to build, entities, APIs, submission instructions.

submission_config.description: Controls retry logic and evaluator confirmation flow.

EnginePattern.description: The six evaluation patterns. CREATE: collect entities + POST. CREATE_WITH_AMENDMENT: same but change one entity mid-conversation. RETRIEVE: look up by identifier. MODIFY: retrieve then update. DELETE: cancel/remove. EDGE_CASE: inject invalid input.

DialogNamePolicy.description: How to match dialog names in the bot export. 'contains' is recommended — 'exact' requires byte-for-byte match.

EntityDefinition.description: An entity the bot must collect during conversation.

entity_key.description: Must match the bot's entity node name exactly (e.g. 'patientName', 'contactNumber').

semantic_hint.description: Natural language description for the LLM driver (e.g. 'the patient\'s full name').

value_pool.description: Realistic test values the driver picks from. Leave empty for cross-task references.

validation_required.description: Whether the bot is expected to have validation rules for this entity.

AmendmentConfig.description: Configuration for CREATE_WITH_AMENDMENT pattern. Tests the Agent Node's ability to handle mid-conversation changes.

amendment_utterance_template.description: Template the driver uses to request the change. Must contain {amended_value} placeholder.

amended_value_pool.description: Values to substitute for the amended entity.

CrossTaskReference.description: Links a task to data produced by an earlier task (e.g. 'use bookingId from Booking1').

source_task_id.description: Task ID that created the record.

source_record_alias.description: Record alias from the source task (e.g. 'Booking1').

source_field.description: Field name in the source record (e.g. 'bookingId', 'contactNumber').

StateAssertion.description: After webhook conversation, verify the API state matches expectations.

verify_endpoint.description: GET endpoint URL to query for verification.

filter_field.description: Field used to locate the record in the API response.

field_assertions.description: Map of entity_key → JSON path in API response for value comparison.

expect_deletion.description: For DELETE pattern: expect the record to be absent.

NegativeTest.description: Edge case test: inject invalid input and verify graceful error handling.

expected_error_pattern.description: Regex or keyword the bot's error response must contain.

requires_re_entry_prompt.description: Whether the bot should prompt the user to try again.

RequiredNode.description: A node that must exist in the dialog for the CBM structural check.

node_type.description: Node type to look for: 'aiassist' (Agent Node), 'service', 'entity', 'message', 'form', 'script', 'prompt'.

label.description: Human-readable label shown in the report.

required.description: If false, absence produces a warning instead of a failure.

FAQItem.description: A single FAQ the bot must support.

required_keywords.description: Keywords that must appear in the bot's answer.

alternate_questions.description: Alternative phrasings the bot should also handle.

required_faqs.description: List of FAQs the bot must implement.

semantic_similarity_threshold.description: Threshold for semantic FAQ matching (future phase).

ComplianceCheck.description: A platform compliance check verified against the bot export.

critical.description: If true, failure auto-fails the entire assessment regardless of score.

ScoringConfig.description: Scoring weights. Webhook is the authority (0.80) — CBM is informational only (0.0).

pass_threshold.description: Minimum overall score to pass (0.0 to 1.0).

StateSeedingConfig.description: State seeding injects synthetic data when CREATE fails, preventing cascade failures in RETRIEVE/MODIFY tasks.

seed_endpoint.description: POST endpoint for seeding. Falls back to mock_api_base_url if empty.

TaskDefinition.description: A single evaluation task. Each task maps to exactly one EnginePattern.

task_name.description: Human-readable name shown in the report.

dialog_name.description: Expected dialog name in the bot export.

cross_task_refs.description: References to data from earlier tasks (for RETRIEVE, MODIFY, DELETE).

required_greeting_text.description: For welcome/greeting task: expected greeting text.

required_menu_items.description: For welcome task: menu items the bot must display.

conversation_starter.description: Override opening message for this specific task.

co_reference_test.description: If true, tests providing two entities in one utterance.

modifiable_fields.description: For MODIFY pattern: which fields can be changed.

modified_value_pool.description: For MODIFY pattern: new values for each modifiable field.

weight.description: Scoring weight multiplier for this task.

expected_output.description: Per-task pass criteria authored at manifest time, validated in Phase 5.

AssignmentBrief.description: Candidate-facing brief: what to build, entities to collect, API endpoints, submission instructions.

SubmissionConfig.description: Controls retry logic and evaluator confirmation flow.

ExpectedOutput.description: Per-task pass criteria authored at manifest time, validated in Phase 5.
